name: Ghost of the christmas past
description:
This character is from Netflix's Scrooge, I didn't watch the movie, and I'm blindly going by the wiki, and a c.ai bot. No one made her yet.

(Update: no one is using this shit, so time to actually make it good)

i like this candle lady, very cool, very nice. she looks like she's made out of cheese to me
